_comment: Copy this file to config.json. On a live server, install.sh places it at /etc/conduit-cc/config.json. Do not store secrets here — secrets belong in .env. Log level (LOG_LEVEL) is also in .env, not here.

conduit._comment_metrics_port: metrics_port must match --metrics-addr in /etc/systemd/system/conduit.service. Default: 127.0.0.1:9090 (loopback only). Change both together or metrics will not work.
